name: MikroTik Hot Swap PSU DPS-550AB-36G
title: MikroTik Hot Swap PSU DPS-550AB-36G
description: The MikroTik DPS-550AB-36G is a high-efficiency, hot-swappable power supply unit engineered as a direct replacement for the RDS2216 Rose Data Server. Delivering 12V output at 550W, it ensures stable and reliable power delivery for demanding enterprise workloads while supporting the server’s modular and energy-conscious design. Specifically designed to complement the RDS2216’s low power consumption and minimal thermal footprint, this PSU plays a crucial role in maintaining system efficiency and uptime. The hot-swap capability allows for quick and uninterrupted replacement, making it ideal for high-availability environments where continuous operation is critical. Constructed with reliability and sustainability in mind, the DPS-550AB-36G aligns with MikroTik’s commitment to eco-friendly, high-performance infrastructure solutions. Whether used for redundancy or replacement, it helps maximize server uptime without compromising energy efficiency.
